title: KAIWEETS network cable testerRJ45 RJ11 network tester for Telephone Lines,ethernet tester LAN Cables, Suitable for Cable Tracing, Line Testing, Continuity Checking
features: Multi-Function cable tracer：integrates cable tracing, wire mapping, telephone line status detection, voltage level and polarity identification, as well as continuity testing. It allows technicians to quickly identify target cables in complex wiring environments, making it an ideal tool for network and communication professionals. Note: Always turn off power before tracing metal wires to avoid device damage

Wide Cable Compatibility：cable finder supports tracing of RJ11 and RJ45 cables, telephone lines, and other metal wires. It features an adjustable volume knob to optimize signal reception and reduce interference. The built-in LED flashlight ensures easy operation in dark or narrow spaces

Comprehensive Wire Mapping：With the transmitter and receiver working in tandem, network cable tester enables pin-to-pin wire mapping to verify cable integrity. It can detect open circuits, short circuits, miswiring, and reversed connections. Loud tone output and bright LED indicators help quickly locate target cables, supporting test distances up to 300 meters

Telephone Line Status Testing：network cable tester independently tests telephone line conditions, identifying idle, ringing, and active call states. It also determines the polarity of TIP or RING lines via the transmitter. Equipped with continuity and voltage-level testing capabilities, it is suitable for telecom, home, and industrial network installations and maintenance

Package & Support：cable tester comes with all necessary accessories: User Manual ×1, RJ11 Alligator Clip (Black) ×1, RJ45 Adapter Cable (Black) ×1, 6F22/9V Battery ×2. We provide up to 36 months of customer service and technical support, ensuring peace of mind
